name: BB:DeviceDefinition: Virtualization
notes: This rule defines all Hypervisors on the system.
bb_references: BB:DeviceDefinition: Virtualization on events which are detected by the LOCAL system
conditions_text: when the event(s) were detected by one or more of EMC VMWare, VMware vCenter, VMware vCloud Director, VMware vShield, IBM SmartCloud Orchestrator
TD_list: APPLY BB:DeviceDefinition: Virtualization on events which are detected by the LOCAL system
AND when the event(s) were detected by one or more of EMC VMWare, VMware vCenter, VMware vCloud Director, VMware vShield, IBM SmartCloud Orchestrator
